hooks.description: Inject plan plugin operating rules and workflow expectations

steps.message: The plan plugin is active. Operating rules are in AGENTS.md and OPERATING-RULES.md. The plan skill is the coordinator — it runs in the main context and orchestrates worker subagents. Available worker agents: repo-researcher, ambiguity-reviewer, risk-reviewer, problem-framing-reviewer, testability-reviewer, observability-reviewer. Available skills: plan, intake-and-scope, clarification-loop, feature-request-generation. Key rules: (1) Produce complete feature requests only — never implementation plans. (2) No novelty claim without repository evidence. (3) The clarification loop is mandatory — do not finalize until all material ambiguity is resolved. (4) Challenge wrong-problem framing. (5) Ask fewer but better questions. Engineering principles from dev:principles apply — key: Clear Boundary (push for typed contracts in requirements), Test-Centric (acceptance criteria must be mechanically verifiable), Observability (structured logging, monitoring, debugging affordances).

hooks.description: Block file modifications — this plugin analyzes, it does not edit

steps.message: The plan plugin is in analysis mode. It should not modify source files. If you are generating the final feature request, write it to the conversation output — do not create files in the repository.

hooks.description: Reinforce evidence gathering expectations for repository research

steps.message: Gathering repository evidence. Remember: no novelty claim without evidence. Search thoroughly for related functionality — check code, tests, configs, docs, schemas, routes, UI components, and feature flags. Summarize findings as structured evidence for the decision ledger.

hooks.description: Remind to update the decision ledger after evidence gathering

steps.message: Evidence gathered. Update the decision ledger with findings: what was found, what it means for the feature request, and whether it resolves any open questions or introduces new ones.
